description: TYPO3 v13 Composer Standard Installation - Extensions ONLY in vendor directory

news.reason: Should find georgringer/news in vendor directory

powermail.reason: Should find example/powermail in vendor directory

notes: TYPO3 v13 Composer installation with standard public web directory
In Composer mode, extensions MUST be in vendor directory only
Core packages (typo3/cms-*) are excluded from extension discovery
